full_text:
Dissociation was done in 20ml of Dispase + dissociation medium. Final pellet was resuspended in 1ml of dissociation medium

Cell count 1):

total: 9.2 E5

live: 5.91 E5

viability: 64.3 %

size: 81 um

Cell count 2):

total: 9.16 E5

live: 4.56 E5

viability: 49.8 %

size: 7.1 um

Total cell count: 9.2 e5 / mL

Total volume: 1 mL

Leftover tissue on the strainer was further digested for 1 h with 1X C&H by Maria. But the yield was too low (0.6E6 cells, 60% viability).

The ice section diagnosis was borderline malignant serous tumor. Hence did not freeze the cells or cultured for further experiment

Reagent | Stock concentration | Working concentration | Ratio
Omentum gel | 17.7 mg/mL | 2.5 mg/mL | 0.141
Aprotinin | 10 mg/mL | 33.3 ug/mL | 0.003
Thrombin | 100 U | 0.3 U | 0.003
Fibrinogen | 25 ug/mL | 0.5 ug/mL | 0.02
